metadata.title: Amazon CodeCatalyst
metadata.remarks: EXPERIMENTAL USE ONLY. This Open Security Controls Assessment Language (OSCAL) content has been prepared by AWS for informational purposes only. This OSCAL package is experimental and may contain errors or inconsistencies with the authoritative version of published information. Future versions of this OSCAL content, if any, may not be backwards compatible. Our goals for this experiment are to understand customer interest and use-cases for machine-readable compliance artifacts. To that end, AWS needs your [feedback](https://github.com/awslabs/oscal-content-for-aws-services/issues/new) about the quality and usefulness of this content.

components.title: Amazon CodeCatalyst
components.description: Amazon CodeCatalyst is a unified software development service that enables teams to quickly build, deliver, and collaborate on applications by providing integrated tools for project management, code repositories, CI/CD pipelines, and development environments.
components.remarks: Customers can't on-board to services and features in the maintenance stage. Customers already using these services and features can continue to do so. AWS will continue to operate and support these services and features but won't enhance or add functionality to them. We recommend that customers learn about and explore the alternatives suggested in the product pages and documentation.
